'''hajutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbila|mbila]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbila|mbila]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hajutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjitith|hæjitith]] || [[word:hæjitij|hæjitij]] || [[word:hæjitish|hæjitish]] || [[word:hæjiti|hæjiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajujututh|hajujututh]] || [[word:hajujutuj|hajujutuj]] || [[word:hajujutush|hajujutush]] || [[word:hajujutu|hajujutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajututh|hajututh]] || [[word:hajutuj|hajutuj]] || [[word:hajutush|hajutush]] || [[word:hajutu|hajutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajuftuth|hajuftuth]] || [[word:hajuftuj|hajuftuj]] || [[word:hajuftush|hajuftush]] || [[word:hajuftuf|hajuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajututhu|hajututhu]] || [[word:hajutuju|hajutuju]] || [[word:hajutushu|hajutushu]] || [[word:hajutuku|hajutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajututh|hajututh]] || [[word:hajutuj|hajutuj]] || [[word:hajutush|hajutush]] || [[word:hajutu|hajutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajututhul|hajututhul]] || [[word:hajutujul|hajutujul]] || [[word:hajutushul|hajutushul]] || [[word:hajutukul|hajutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajututhuthu|hajututhuthu]] || [[word:hajutujuju|hajutujuju]] || [[word:hajutushushu|hajutushushu]] || [[word:hajutuku|hajutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajututhun|hajututhun]] || [[word:hajutujun|hajutujun]] || [[word:hajutushun|hajutushun]] || [[word:hajutukun|hajutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajututhuoro|hajututhuoro]] || [[word:hajutujuoro|hajutujuoro]] || [[word:hajutushuoro|hajutushuoro]] || [[word:hajutukuoro|hajutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
